384PP.notes: Echo Qualified 384-well polypropylene source. DMSO compatible. Beckman 001-14555/14615/14618.

384LDV.notes: Echo Qualified 384-well low dead volume (cyclic olefin copolymer). DMSO working volume 3-12 uL. Beckman 001-12782/16128/6025.

1536LDV.notes: Echo Qualified 1536-well low dead volume (cyclic olefin copolymer). General working volume 1-5.5 uL. Beckman 001-6969/8768/7913. x/y offsets not yet calibrated.

384PP_Amine_Coated.notes: Echo Qualified amine-coated 384-well polypropylene, sterile. Optimized for aqueous transfers on Echo 525. Beckman 001-14622.

384LDV_Carboxyl_Coated.notes: Echo Qualified carboxyl-coated 384-well low dead volume, sterile. Optimized for aqueous transfers on Echo 525. Beckman 001-13070.

Reservoir_2x3.notes: Echo Qualified 2x3 reservoir for large-volume transfers on Echo 525. Working volume 250 uL - 2.8 mL. Beckman 001-11101. x/y offsets not yet calibrated.

EchoMS_384PP.notes: Echo MS Qualified 384-well polypropylene for SCIEX Echo MS System. Beckman C74290.

EchoMS_1536LDV.notes: Echo MS Qualified 1536-well low dead volume for SCIEX Echo MS System. Beckman C52621. x/y offsets not yet calibrated.
